queries.question: What software is used for Introductory Organic Chemistry?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    r.name AS Resource_Title
FROM 
    Courses c
    INNER JOIN Software r ON c.Software_id = r.id
WHERE 
    c.course_name = 'Introductory Organic Chemistry';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?r a :Software .
  ?c p:hasSoftware ?r .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?c p:course_name ?course_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?course_name_f) = "Introductory Organic Chemistry")
}

queries.question: Which textbooks is Alice Smith using?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    r.title AS Resource_Title
FROM 
    Students s
    INNER JOIN Courses c ON s.enrolled_course_id = c.id
    INNER JOIN Textbooks r ON c.textbook_id = r.id
WHERE 
    s.student_name = 'Alice Smith';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?s p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?r a :Textbooks .
  ?c p:hasTextbooks ?r .
  ?r p:title ?title .
  ?s p:student_name ?student_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?student_name_f) = "Alice Smith")
}

queries.question: What resources are used for Introductory Organic Chemistry?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    r.title, sw.name
FROM 
    Courses c
    INNER JOIN Textbooks r ON c.textbook_id = r.id INNER JOIN Software sw ON c.Software_id = sw.id
WHERE 
    c.course_name = 'Introductory Organic Chemistry';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?r a :Textbooks .
  ?c p:hasTextbooks ?r .
  ?sw a :Software .
  ?c p:hasSoftware ?sw .
  ?r p:title ?title .
  ?sw p:name ?name .
  ?c p:course_name ?course_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?course_name_f) = "Introductory Organic Chemistry")
}

queries.question: Which textbooks and software is Alice Smith using?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    r.title, sw.name
FROM 
    Students s
    INNER JOIN Courses c ON s.enrolled_course_id = c.id
    INNER JOIN Textbooks r ON c.textbook_id = r.id  INNER JOIN Software sw ON c.Software_id = sw.id
WHERE 
    s.student_name = 'Alice Smith';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?s p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?r a :Textbooks .
  ?c p:hasTextbooks ?r .
  ?sw a :Software .
  ?c p:hasSoftware ?sw .
  ?r p:title ?title .
  ?sw p:name ?name .
  ?s p:student_name ?student_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?student_name_f) = "Alice Smith")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What resources are used for Introductory Organic Chemistry?
Which resource is Alice Smith using?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?s p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?r a :Textbooks .
  ?c p:hasTextbooks ?r .
  ?r p:title ?title .
  ?s p:student_name ?student_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?student_name_f) = "Alice Smith")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?s p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?r a :Software .
  ?c p:hasSoftware ?r .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?s p:student_name ?student_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?student_name_f) = "Alice Smith")
} }
  full: { SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?s a :Students .
  ?c a :Courses .
  ?s p:hasCourses ?c .
  ?r a :Textbooks .
  ?c p:hasTextbooks ?r .
  ?sw a :Software .
  ?c p:hasSoftware ?sw .
  ?r p:title ?title .
  ?sw p:name ?name .
  ?s p:student_name ?student_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?student_name_f) = "Alice Smith")
} }
}
